source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A 4-bit D/A converter is connected to a free-running 3-bit UP counter, as shown in the <image>. Which of the following waveforms will be observed at \( v_0 \)?

verifiability: answer is a discrete choice ('Waveform B'), so final-answer checking is straightforward
